# PERF-224 positive: recursive tree walk on request path
lang: go
file: PERF-224-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type Node struct {
	Children []*Node
}

func assignIDs(node *Node) {
	for _, child := range node.Children {
		assignIDs(child)
	}
}

func HandleTree(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, root *Node) {
	flatNodes := []*Node{root}
	_ = flatNodes
	assignIDs(root)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
